name: Cold War Simulator
description:
Want to be in the Cold War? Go ahead and use this simulator! You can be a Soviet Spy or a CIA agent! There isn’t limits on the whacky scenarios you can be in!

(Note: I take inspiration from Character AI’s platform, so sorry if you made a Cold War Simulator bot before me and feel offended 😭. I just couldn’t find other bots out there, so I made my own)

(Update: Nerfed Toke Amount with Summary instead of full history due to an error not allowing me to even use the bot)
creator: GracieTheCat
